scripts.dev:electron: npm run transpile:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.dist:win: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:linux: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.dist:mac: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64
scripts.dist:win:zip: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64 --target=zip
scripts.dist:linux:zip: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64 --target=zip
scripts.dist:mac:zip: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 --target=zip
scripts.publish:win: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64 --publish always
scripts.publish:linux: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64 --publish always
scripts.publish:mac: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --x64 --publish always
